chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-2161 of 2026 Date Signature of Judge(s) Fresh Case. 1. For orders on Misc. No. 8596/2026. 2. For orders on office objections 1 to 3. 3. For orders on Misc. No.8597/2026 4. For hearing of main case. 8th April, 2026. Mr. Mamoon A.K. Sherwany, Advocate for the Petitioner. >>>>>>> <<<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. Through this petition, Petitioner Saqib Bin Rauf son of Abdul Rauf, who at the moment is stated to be in UAE and returning back to Pakistan tomorrow, through his brother Danish Bin Rauf seeks protective/anticipatory bail in FIR No. 270/2025, under sections 384/385/420/34 PPC registered with PS Taimoria, Karachi against him and others. It is contended that petitioner is prepared to surrender before the trial Court but apprehends his arrest on his arrival at the hands of Police/FIA officials at Jinnah International Airport, Karachi, hence this petition. Since petitioner is prepared to surrender before the trial Court, without touching the merits of the case, protective/anticipatory bail is granted to him for a period of seven days from today, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days from today or when the petitioner surrenders before the concerned trial court, whichever is earlier. The instant petition alongwith office objection stands disposed of. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES Aamir/PS JUDGE
